dashboard.label: Uber Operations Command Center
dashboard.description: Real-time ride-hailing operations analytics with branded custom visualizations
dashboard.definition: {"dataSources":{"ds_kpi_rides":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_kpis.csv | search metric=\"Active Rides\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Active Rides KPI"},"ds_kpi_eta":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_kpis.csv | search metric=\"Avg ETA\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Avg ETA KPI"},"ds_kpi_rating":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_kpis.csv | search metric=\"Avg Rating\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Avg Rating KPI"},"ds_kpi_surge":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_kpis.csv | search metric=\"Surge Multiplier\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Surge Multiplier KPI"},"ds_surge_heatmap":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_surge.csv","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Surge Heatmap Data"},"ds_supply":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_supply.csv | head 1","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Driver Supply Data"},"ds_trips":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_trips.csv | sort 0 -_time","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Trip Feed Data"},"ds_routes":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup uber_ops_viz_demo_routes.csv | sort 0 -trip_count","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Top Routes Data"}},"visualizations":{"viz_canvas_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#0A0A0A","strokeColor":"transparent"}},"viz_banner_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#000000","strokeColor":"transparent"}},"viz_banner_accent":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#06C167","strokeColor":"transparent"}},"viz_banner_title":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**UBER** OPERATIONS","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","fontSize":"large","fontColor":"#F6F6F6","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_banner_subtitle":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"COMMAND CENTER \u2014 REAL-TIME CITY METRICS","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Mono","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontColor":"rgba(246,246,246,0.40)","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_kpi_rides":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_rides"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.metricField":"metric","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.valueField":"value","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.deltaField":"delta","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitField":"unit","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitPositionField":"unitPosition","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentColor":"#06C167","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_kpi_eta":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_eta"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.metricField":"metric","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.valueField":"value","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.deltaField":"delta","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitField":"unit","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitPositionField":"unitPosition","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentColor":"#276EF1","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_kpi_rating":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_rating"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.metricField":"metric","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.valueField":"value","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.deltaField":"delta","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitField":"unit","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitPositionField":"unitPosition","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentColor":"#06C167","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_kpi_surge_multi":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_surge"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.metricField":"metric","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.valueField":"value","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.deltaField":"delta","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitField":"unit","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.unitPositionField":"unitPosition","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentColor":"#FF6937","uber_ops_viz.kpi_tile.accentIntensity":"60"}},"viz_kpi_panel_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)","rx":2,"ry":2}},"viz_surge_panel_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)","rx":2,"ry":2}},"viz_surge_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"SURGE PRICING \u2014 24H HEATMAP","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Mono","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontColor":"rgba(246,246,246,0.28)","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_surge_heatmap":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_surge_heatmap"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap.hourField":"hour","uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap.zoneField":"zone","uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap.surgeField":"surge","uber_ops_viz.surge_heatmap.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_gauge_panel_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)","rx":2,"ry":2}},"viz_gauge_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"DRIVER SUPPLY","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Mono","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontColor":"rgba(246,246,246,0.28)","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_supply_gauge":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_supply"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.availableField":"available","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.demandedField":"demanded","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.ratioField":"ratio","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.maxValue":"100","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.redZoneStart":"70","uber_ops_viz.supply_gauge.accentIntensity":"55"}},"viz_feed_panel_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)","rx":2,"ry":2}},"viz_feed_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"LIVE TRIP FEED","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Mono","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontColor":"rgba(246,246,246,0.28)","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_trip_feed":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.trip_feed","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_trips"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.tripIdField":"trip_id","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.originField":"origin","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.destinationField":"destination","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.fareField":"fare","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.distanceField":"distance","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.durationField":"duration","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.ratingField":"rating","uber_ops_viz.trip_feed.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_routes_panel_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)","rx":2,"ry":2}},"viz_routes_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"TOP ROUTES \u2014 BY TRIP COUNT","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Mono","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontColor":"rgba(246,246,246,0.28)","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_routes_table":{"type":"uber_ops_viz.routes_table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_routes"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.theme":"dark","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.rankField":"rank","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.routeField":"route","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.tripCountField":"trip_count","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.avgFareField":"avg_fare","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.avgDurationField":"avg_duration","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.satisfactionField":"satisfaction","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.rowsPerPage":"10","uber_ops_viz.routes_table.accentIntensity":"50"}}},"inputs":{},"layout":{"globalInputs":[],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_0","label":"Overview"},{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Route Analytics"}],"options":{"barPosition":"top","showTabBar":true}},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_0":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1200},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1200}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":64}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":62,"w":1920,"h":2}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":8,"w":400,"h":48}},{"item":"viz_banner_subtitle","type":"block","position":{"x":430,"y":24,"w":500,"h":28}},{"item":"viz_kpi_panel_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":82,"w":1880,"h":110}},{"item":"viz_kpi_rides","type":"block","position":{"x":28,"y":86,"w":450,"h":100}},{"item":"viz_kpi_eta","type":"block","position":{"x":498,"y":86,"w":440,"h":100}},{"item":"viz_kpi_rating","type":"block","position":{"x":958,"y":86,"w":440,"h":100}},{"item":"viz_kpi_surge_multi","type":"block","position":{"x":1418,"y":86,"w":474,"h":100}},{"item":"viz_surge_panel_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":208,"w":1230,"h":460}},{"item":"viz_surge_label","type":"block","position":{"x":36,"y":214,"w":400,"h":22}},{"item":"viz_surge_heatmap","type":"block","position":{"x":28,"y":238,"w":1214,"h":422}},{"item":"viz_gauge_panel_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":1268,"y":208,"w":632,"h":460}},{"item":"viz_gauge_label","type":"block","position":{"x":1284,"y":214,"w":300,"h":22}},{"item":"viz_supply_gauge","type":"block","position":{"x":1276,"y":238,"w":616,"h":422}},{"item":"viz_feed_panel_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":684,"w":920,"h":500}},{"item":"viz_feed_label","type":"block","position":{"x":36,"y":690,"w":300,"h":22}},{"item":"viz_trip_feed","type":"block","position":{"x":28,"y":714,"w":904,"h":462}}]},"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1200},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1200}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":64}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":62,"w":1920,"h":2}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":8,"w":400,"h":48}},{"item":"viz_banner_subtitle","type":"block","position":{"x":430,"y":24,"w":500,"h":28}},{"item":"viz_routes_panel_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":82,"w":1880,"h":1100}},{"item":"viz_routes_label","type":"block","position":{"x":36,"y":88,"w":400,"h":22}},{"item":"viz_routes_table","type":"block","position":{"x":28,"y":112,"w":1864,"h":1060}}]}}},"description":"Uber Operations Command Center \u2014 real-time ride-hailing analytics","title":"Uber Operations Command Center"}
